title: Finance Close Anomaly Investigator
summary: Investigate unusual account movements, close-time anomalies, and reconciliation risk inside an embedded finance analytics app.
knowledge_base: User: controller and finance operations teams during close.
Primary pain: finance anomalies are found late and require manual detective work across many systems.
Decision output: prioritize journals, reconciliations, and business units for review.
Business impact: shorter close cycles and fewer late adjustments.

app_modules.label: Close 01
app_modules.title: Journal Risk Score
app_modules.description: Score the current close packet for material anomaly risk.

app_modules.label: Close 02
app_modules.title: Variance Review
app_modules.description: Compare this month's close risk signals against the prior month baseline.

app_modules.label: Close 03
app_modules.title: Controller Brief
app_modules.description: Draft the close-risk note for the controller review meeting.
